# Open GeoFeed Protocol (OGP)

> The open infrastructure layer for Local GEO — structured activity feeds anchored to geographic hierarchies.

## What is OGP?

OGP is a federated protocol for publishing and consuming structured local activity feeds.
Feeds are anchored to SubdivisionPaths — hierarchical geographic identifiers like `bra/sp/sao-paulo/tatuape`.

## How to use this site

- `geofeed.ai/{geopath}` — human-readable registry page (HTML)
- `api.geofeed.ai/{geopath}` — JSON registry data (for applications)
- `md.geofeed.ai/{geopath}` — Markdown registry data (for LLMs and RAG)
- `mcp.geofeed.ai` — MCP server endpoint (for AI agents)

## SubdivisionPath format

```
bra                           # country (ISO 3166-1 alpha-3)
bra/sp                        # state
bra/sp/sao-paulo              # municipality
bra/sp/sao-paulo/tatuape      # neighborhood
```

## GeoFeed activity format

OGP uses ActivityPub wire format extended with a `geopath` field:

```json
{
  "@context": ["https://www.w3.org/ns/activitystreams"],
  "type": "Create",
  "actor": "https://findera.app/actors/salao-gi-matos",
  "object": {
    "type": "Note",
    "geopath": "bra/sp/sao-paulo/tatuape",
    "content": "Agenda aberta para esta semana!"
  }
}
```

## Registry JSON schema

```json
{
  "geopath": "bra/sp/sao-paulo/tatuape",
  "type": "bra-neighborhood",
  "name": "Tatuapé",
  "parent": "bra/sp/sao-paulo",
  "servers": [
    {
      "url": "https://findera.app/geo/bra/sp/sao-paulo/tatuape",
      "type": "feed",
      "operator": "findera.com.br"
    }
  ],
  "geoshape": { "type": "Polygon", "coordinates": [] }
}
```

## Server types

- `index` — static presence (name, address, contact)
- `feed` — activity feed (posts, events, offers)
- `signal` — real-time feed (high-frequency updates)
- `promoted:true` — promoted placement
